name: code-insights
description: Track Sourcegraph search result counts over time to visualize code trends and compare metrics

--interval.description: Collection interval in hours (default: 24, informational — actual scheduling is external)

collect.description: Run a collection for a specific insight or all insights

--name.description: Specific insight to collect (if omitted, collects all)

trend.description: Show the trend for an insight with ASCII sparkline chart

--format.description: Output format: text or json (default: text)

compare.description: Compare two insights side by side

snapshot.description: Get current values for all insights without storing results

list.description: List all insights with their status

delete.description: Delete an insight and all its collected data

name.description: Name of the insight to delete

health.description: Check Sourcegraph connectivity and database state
